items.name: hero-centered
items.title: Hero Centered
items.description: Centered hero section with headline, subtitle, dual CTA, and optional input capture. Supports light/dark/gradient backgrounds, configurable currency, phone/email/custom input, and two-tone headline accent. Suitable for SaaS, EdTech, e-commerce, fintech, and any marketing landing page.

items.name: hero-split
items.title: Hero Split
items.description: Split hero with text on the left and visual on the right. Supports configurable CTA style (pill or rectangle), phone/email input capture, two-tone headline, trust signals, and floating widget slot. Works for SaaS, EdTech, e-commerce, finance, and any marketing page.

items.name: navbar-simple
items.title: Navbar Simple
items.description: Simple responsive navbar with logo, navigation links, and CTA button. Supports pill or rectangle button style, mobile hamburger menu, dark mode, and configurable social links. Works for any marketing landing page.

items.name: footer-simple
items.title: Footer Simple
items.description: Multi-column footer with logo, tagline, link groups, social icons, copyright, and legal links. Responsive grid layout. Works for any marketing page.

items.name: features-grid
items.title: Features Grid
items.description: Section with badge, headline, subtitle, and a responsive grid of feature cards (2, 3, or 4 columns). Supports icons, light/dark/surface backgrounds. Suitable for any product or service.

items.name: features-alternating
items.title: Features Alternating
items.description: Zigzag feature section with alternating text and visual layout. Supports bullet lists, per-feature CTAs, custom visuals, and light/dark/surface backgrounds. Ideal for detailed feature explainers.
